title: Friendship Bracelets
description: Friendship Bracelets to form a bond with your best friend.
body:
# Friendship Bracelets
This mod adds bracelets you and your friend can wear to know where the other is.
This mod is made for ModFest '25 but I may update it.
## Features
- Basic Bracelet
  - Use with a 2nd one in your offhand to link them
  - Can be equiped in trinket slot
  - Use to get to know the holder of the linked bracelet, their location and highlight them
  - Renders on your arm
- Maybe I'll make more bracelets some time
